TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Wake kanatal == Wake kanatal o samimingay kanatal no kanatanatal no Marshall kanatal, ka'amisay Taypinyang karat a kanatal, kakaya' no sekal 19 kongli, salongan nai Hawaii tangasa Ka'amisay Marian kanatal to kalitoloan a rakat . Nawhani i kaetipay no kafafalican no kasakitakit romi'ad cira, orasaka I'ayaw ko romi'ad no 50 kanatal no Amilika, midemak to UTC+12 patodongan i. O awaay ko pipatireng sofal no Amilika to Wake kanatal, o dadahal 6.5 ko pinfang kongli, nai Wick, Wilkes ato Pierre toloay sacefang taporo a kanatal, itiraay i nano manaopay no riyar nano namalaylotok a kasakanatal i Taypinyang , kawali o Hawai to 3200 kongli ko ray, kaetip Guan 2060 kongli k ray, o tadamaanay kaitiraan no kalaloodan, saka o sowal "Pasaripa'an a Taypinyang" ahan. O yofing ato dingwa a satelek no Wake kanatal o nai Hawaii (sofal96898, etal dingwa+1-808), sa'osien ono "o papotalay no Amilika a kanatal" a cecay (ISO 3166-1 UN). Likisi Ona awaayay ko tamdaw no Wake kanatal, I 1568 miheca o cecay Spain misolapay sakapot sarakat pakanengneng tonini a kanatal. I 1796 miheca, o Kyaputen no Inkiris ci William Wick mipangangan tonini kanatal, no ningra a ngangan ko pipangangan tonini a kanatal. Ikor nonini kanatal awaay kafanafana'an, tangasa 1841 miheca o sofitay no Amilika miliyaw misolimet patireng to kanatal. I 1899 miheca o macalapay to no Amilika siofo konini a kanatal. I 1935 miheca o Wake kanatal palekapotan to no sofitay kowanan no Amilika saka patireng to kahiceraan i kalali'acaan no nanoman hikoki ato pilafinan, o Fanmi hikoki mirakatay to Taypinyang lafangan padamso a dademakan. Macalap no Dipong ko Wake kanatal i saka 2 Kalaloodan no hekal, ikor no lalood patiyol to yaan a ngangan. I 1962 miheca pala o aniniay hikokiciw patorodan ko lalomaan citodongay no Amilika ko Wake kanatal, nika oya to o sofitay no Amillika ko cisakowanay. I 1972 miheca, onini kanatal o citodongay to sofitay no Amilika ko nicadaay, o sakidemak citodongay salalomaan no sofitay o komong talicayan to sarikec no sofitay, o kakeridan to ni sofitay citodongay i Wake kanatal. I 1974 miheca pitanaman to papotang kaitiraan, 1975 miheca ona pakamaro'an to malafelay finawlan no Vietnam. Nai 70 to'ek miheca tangasa anini, kikokiciw no Wake kanatal ono sofitay ato finawlan malekapotay kahiceraan a hikokiciw koni, oya hikoki sofitay no Amilika nai Honolulu tayra Tokyo ato Guam a piparoan to simal. Kaitiraan Kaitiraan: 19°17′N 166°36′E Etal a sera: 6.5 pinfang kongli. O sekal: 19.3 kongli. Sofal no riyar a salongoc No kicay a liyok: 200 nm (22.2km) Romi'ad: faedet, talikedaay faliyos. Akaraway: Salaenoay: Taypinyang 0 m Satakaraway: away ko panganganan 6 m. Kasenengan ponka O nisanga'an pisalama kalalood ko nipasadakan, o Wake kanatal kinapinapina masadak kalaloodan to patinakoan. Sakatosa lalood tasalamaan to kalalood macacefis to kanatal no Amilika ato Congko to Wake kanatal. Sakalima lalood ira ko cicu no Wake kanatal, malawlaay mipatinako saka 2 lalood a to'ek o sofitay no Amilika ano eca sofitay no Dipong micalap tonini a kanatal. Pinengnengan to tilid
S.PHON: == wakə kanataɾ == wakə kanataɾ o~u samimiŋaj kanataɾ no~u kanatanataɾ no~u marsħaɾɾ kanataɾ, kaʡamisaj tajpinjaŋ karat a kanataɾ, kakajaʡ no~u səkaɾ ** ko~uŋɾi, saɾo~uŋan nai ħawaii taŋasa kaʡamisaj marian kanataɾ to~u kaɾito~uɾo~uan a rakat . nawħani i kaətipaj no~u kafafaɾiʦan no~u kasakitakit ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦira, o~urasaka iʡajaw ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ** kanataɾ no~u amiɾika, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u o~u~utʦ+** pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan i. o~u awaaj ko~u pipatirəŋ so~ufaɾ no~u amiɾika to~u wakə kanataɾ, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ *.* ko~u pinfaŋ ko~uŋɾi, nai wiʦk, wiɾkəs ato~u piərrə to~uɾo~uaj saʦəfaŋ tapo~uro~u a kanataɾ, itiraaj i nano~u manao~upaj no~u rijar nano~u namaɾajɾo~uto~uk a kasakanataɾ i tajpinjaŋ , kawaɾi o~u ħawai to~u **** ko~uŋɾi ko~u raj, kaətip *o~u~uan **** ko~uŋɾi k raj, o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kaitiraan no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, saka o~u so~uwaɾ "pasaripaʡan a tajpinjaŋ" aħan. o~u jo~ufiŋ ato~u ɬ~ɮiŋwa a satəɾək no~u wakə kanataɾ o~u nai ħawaii (so~ufaɾ*****, ətaɾ ɬ~ɮiŋwa+*-***), saʡo~usiən o~uno~u "o~u papo~utaɾaj no~u amiɾika a kanataɾ" a ʦəʦaj (iso~u ****-* o~u~un). ɾikisi o~una awaajaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u wakə kanataɾ, i **** miħəʦa o~u ʦəʦaj spain miso~uɾapaj sakapo~ut sarakat pakanəŋnəŋ to~unini a kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa, o~u kjapo~u~utən no~u inkiris ʦi wiɾɾiam wiʦk mipaŋaŋan to~unini kanataɾ, no~u niŋra a ŋaŋan ko~u pipaŋaŋan to~unini a kanataɾ. iko~ur no~unini kanataɾ awaaj kafanafanaʡan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa o~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika miɾijaw miso~uɾimət patirəŋ to~u kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa o~u maʦaɾapaj to~u no~u amiɾika sio~ufo~u ko~unini a kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa o~u wakə kanataɾ paɾəkapo~utan to~u no~u so~ufitaj ko~uwanan no~u amiɾika saka patirəŋ to~u kaħiʦəraan i kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan no~u nano~uman ħiko~uki ato~u piɾafinan, o~u fanmi ħiko~uki mirakataj to~u tajpinjaŋ ɾafaŋan paɬ~ɮamso~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan. maʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u wakə kanataɾ i saka * kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ħəkaɾ, iko~ur no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ patijo~uɾ to~u jaan a ŋaŋan. i **** miħəʦa paɾa o~u aniniaj ħiko~ukiʦiw pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan ko~u ɾaɾo~umaan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u amiɾika ko~u wakə kanataɾ, nika o~uja to~u o~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾɾika ko~u ʦisako~uwanaj. i **** miħəʦa, o~unini kanataɾ o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u niʦaɬ~ɮaaj, o~u sakiɬ~ɮəmak ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj saɾaɾo~umaan no~u so~ufitaj o~u ko~umo~uŋ taɾiʦajan to~u sarikəʦ no~u so~ufitaj, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan to~u ni so~ufitaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i wakə kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa pitanaman to~u papo~utaŋ kaitiraan, **** miħəʦa o~una pakamaro~uʡan to~u maɾafəɾaj finawɾan no~u b~viətnam. nai ** to~uʡək miħəʦa taŋasa anini, kiko~ukiʦiw no~u wakə kanataɾ o~uno~u so~ufitaj ato~u finawɾan maɾəkapo~utaj kaħiʦəraan a ħiko~ukiʦiw ko~uni, o~uja ħiko~uki so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika nai ħo~uno~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u tajra to~ukjo~u ato~u *o~u~uam a piparo~uan to~u simaɾ. kaitiraan kaitiraan: ******n *******ə ətaɾ a səra: *.* pinfaŋ ko~uŋɾi. o~u səkaɾ: **.* ko~uŋɾi. so~ufaɾ no~u rijar a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u kiʦaj a ɾijo~uk: *** nm (**.*km) ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ: faəɬ~ɮət, taɾikəɬ~ɮaaj faɾijo~us. akarawaj: saɾaəno~uaj: tajpinjaŋ * m satakarawaj: awaj ko~u paŋaŋanan * m. kasənəŋan po~unka o~u nisaŋaʡan pisaɾama kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u nipasaɬ~ɮakan, o~u wakə kanataɾ kinapinapina masaɬ~ɮak kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan to~u patinako~uan. sakato~usa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ tasaɾamaan to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ maʦaʦəfis to~u kanataɾ no~u amiɾika ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u to~u wakə kanataɾ. sakaɾima ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ʦiʦo~u~u no~u wakə kanataɾ, maɾawɾaaj mipatinako~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a to~uʡək o~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ano~u əʦa so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap to~unini a kanataɾ. pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
S.FORM: == Wake kanatal == Wake kanatal o samimingay kanatal no kanatanatal no Marshall kanatal, ka'amisay Taypinyang karat a kanatal, kakaya' no sekal 19 kongli, salongan nai Hawaii tangasa Ka'amisay Marian kanatal to kalitoloan a rakat . Nawhani i kaetipay no kafafalican no kasakitakit romi'ad cira, orasaka I'ayaw ko romi'ad no 50 kanatal no Amilika, midemak to UTC+12 patodongan i. O awaay ko pipatireng sofal no Amilika to Wake kanatal, o dadahal 6.5 ko pinfang kongli, nai Wick, Wilkes ato Pierre toloay sacefang taporo a kanatal, itiraay i nano manaopay no riyar nano namalaylotok a kasakanatal i Taypinyang , kawali o Hawai to 3200 kongli ko ray, kaetip Guan 2060 kongli k ray, o tadamaanay kaitiraan no kalaloodan, saka o sowal "Pasaripa'an a Taypinyang" ahan. O yofing ato dingwa a satelek no Wake kanatal o nai Hawaii (sofal96898, etal dingwa+1-808), sa'osien ono "o papotalay no Amilika a kanatal" a cecay (ISO 3166-1 UN). Likisi Ona awaayay ko tamdaw no Wake kanatal, I 1568 miheca o cecay Spain misolapay sakapot sarakat pakanengneng tonini a kanatal. I 1796 miheca, o Kyaputen no Inkiris ci William Wick mipangangan tonini kanatal, no ningra a ngangan ko pipangangan tonini a kanatal. Ikor nonini kanatal awaay kafanafana'an, tangasa 1841 miheca o sofitay no Amilika miliyaw misolimet patireng to kanatal. I 1899 miheca o macalapay to no Amilika siofo konini a kanatal. I 1935 miheca o Wake kanatal palekapotan to no sofitay kowanan no Amilika saka patireng to kahiceraan i kalali'acaan no nanoman hikoki ato pilafinan, o Fanmi hikoki mirakatay to Taypinyang lafangan padamso a dademakan. Macalap no Dipong ko Wake kanatal i saka 2 Kalaloodan no hekal, ikor no lalood patiyol to yaan a ngangan. I 1962 miheca pala o aniniay hikokiciw patorodan ko lalomaan citodongay no Amilika ko Wake kanatal, nika oya to o sofitay no Amillika ko cisakowanay. I 1972 miheca, onini kanatal o citodongay to sofitay no Amilika ko nicadaay, o sakidemak citodongay salalomaan no sofitay o komong talicayan to sarikec no sofitay, o kakeridan to ni sofitay citodongay i Wake kanatal. I 1974 miheca pitanaman to papotang kaitiraan, 1975 miheca ona pakamaro'an to malafelay finawlan no Vietnam. Nai 70 to'ek miheca tangasa anini, kikokiciw no Wake kanatal ono sofitay ato finawlan malekapotay kahiceraan a hikokiciw koni, oya hikoki sofitay no Amilika nai Honolulu tayra Tokyo ato Guam a piparoan to simal. Kaitiraan Kaitiraan: 19°17′N 166°36′E Etal a sera: 6.5 pinfang kongli. O sekal: 19.3 kongli. Sofal no riyar a salongoc No kicay a liyok: 200 nm (22.2km) Romi'ad: faedet, talikedaay faliyos. Akaraway: Salaenoay: Taypinyang 0 m Satakaraway: away ko panganganan 6 m. Kasenengan ponka O nisanga'an pisalama kalalood ko nipasadakan, o Wake kanatal kinapinapina masadak kalaloodan to patinakoan. Sakatosa lalood tasalamaan to kalalood macacefis to kanatal no Amilika ato Congko to Wake kanatal. Sakalima lalood ira ko cicu no Wake kanatal, malawlaay mipatinako saka 2 lalood a to'ek o sofitay no Amilika ano eca sofitay no Dipong micalap tonini a kanatal. Pinengnengan to tilid

kaʡamisaj marian kanataɾ to~u kaɾito~uɾo~uan a rakat . nawħani i kaətipaj no~u kafafaɾiʦan no~u kasakitakit ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦira, o~urasaka iʡajaw ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u ** kanataɾ no~u amiɾika, miɬ~ɮəmak to~u o~u~utʦ+** pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan i. o~u awaaj ko~u pipatirəŋ so~ufaɾ no~u amiɾika to~u wakə kanataɾ, o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ *.* ko~u pinfaŋ ko~uŋɾi, nai wiʦk, wiɾkəs ato~u piərrə to~uɾo~uaj saʦəfaŋ tapo~uro~u a kanataɾ, itiraaj i nano~u manao~upaj no~u rijar nano~u namaɾajɾo~uto~uk a kasakanataɾ i tajpinjaŋ , kawaɾi o~u ħawai to~u **** ko~uŋɾi ko~u raj, kaətip *o~u~uan **** ko~uŋɾi k raj, o~u taɬ~ɮamaanaj kaitiraan no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, saka o~u so~uwaɾ "pasaripaʡan a tajpinjaŋ" aħan. o~u jo~ufiŋ ato~u ɬ~ɮiŋwa a satəɾək no~u wakə kanataɾ o~u nai ħawaii (so~ufaɾ*****, ətaɾ ɬ~ɮiŋwa+*-***), saʡo~usiən o~uno~u "o~u papo~utaɾaj no~u amiɾika a kanataɾ" a ʦəʦaj (iso~u ****-* o~u~un). ɾikisi o~una awaajaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u wakə kanataɾ, i **** miħəʦa o~u ʦəʦaj spain miso~uɾapaj sakapo~ut sarakat pakanəŋnəŋ to~unini a kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa, o~u kjapo~u~utən no~u inkiris ʦi wiɾɾiam wiʦk mipaŋaŋan to~unini kanataɾ, no~u niŋra a ŋaŋan ko~u pipaŋaŋan to~unini a kanataɾ. iko~ur no~unini kanataɾ awaaj kafanafanaʡan, taŋasa **** miħəʦa o~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika miɾijaw miso~uɾimət patirəŋ to~u kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa o~u maʦaɾapaj to~u no~u amiɾika sio~ufo~u ko~unini a kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa o~u wakə kanataɾ paɾəkapo~utan to~u no~u so~ufitaj ko~uwanan no~u amiɾika saka patirəŋ to~u kaħiʦəraan i kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan no~u nano~uman ħiko~uki ato~u piɾafinan, o~u fanmi ħiko~uki mirakataj to~u tajpinjaŋ ɾafaŋan paɬ~ɮamso~u a ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan. maʦaɾap no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ko~u wakə kanataɾ i saka * kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ħəkaɾ, iko~ur no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ patijo~uɾ to~u jaan a ŋaŋan. i **** miħəʦa paɾa o~u aniniaj ħiko~ukiʦiw pato~uro~uɬ~ɮan ko~u ɾaɾo~umaan ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj no~u amiɾika ko~u wakə kanataɾ, nika o~uja to~u o~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾɾika ko~u ʦisako~uwanaj. i **** miħəʦa, o~unini kanataɾ o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ko~u niʦaɬ~ɮaaj, o~u sakiɬ~ɮəmak ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj saɾaɾo~umaan no~u so~ufitaj o~u ko~umo~uŋ taɾiʦajan to~u sarikəʦ no~u so~ufitaj, o~u kakəriɬ~ɮan to~u ni so~ufitaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj i wakə kanataɾ. i **** miħəʦa pitanaman to~u papo~utaŋ kaitiraan, **** miħəʦa o~una pakamaro~uʡan to~u maɾafəɾaj finawɾan no~u b~viətnam. nai ** to~uʡək miħəʦa taŋasa anini, kiko~ukiʦiw no~u wakə kanataɾ o~uno~u so~ufitaj ato~u finawɾan maɾəkapo~utaj kaħiʦəraan a ħiko~ukiʦiw ko~uni, o~uja ħiko~uki so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika nai ħo~uno~uɾo~u~uɾo~u~u tajra to~ukjo~u ato~u *o~u~uam a piparo~uan to~u simaɾ. kaitiraan kaitiraan: ******n *******ə ətaɾ a səra: *.* pinfaŋ ko~uŋɾi. o~u səkaɾ: **.* ko~uŋɾi. so~ufaɾ no~u rijar a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u kiʦaj a ɾijo~uk: *** nm (**.*km) ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ: faəɬ~ɮət, taɾikəɬ~ɮaaj faɾijo~us. akarawaj: saɾaəno~uaj: tajpinjaŋ * m satakarawaj: awaj ko~u paŋaŋanan * m. kasənəŋan po~unka o~u nisaŋaʡan pisaɾama kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u nipasaɬ~ɮakan, o~u wakə kanataɾ kinapinapina masaɬ~ɮak kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan to~u patinako~uan. sakato~usa ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ tasaɾamaan to~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ maʦaʦəfis to~u kanataɾ no~u amiɾika ato~u ʦo~uŋko~u to~u wakə kanataɾ. sakaɾima ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ʦiʦo~u~u no~u wakə kanataɾ, maɾawɾaaj mipatinako~u saka * ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a to~uʡək o~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika ano~u əʦa so~ufitaj no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ miʦaɾap to~unini a kanataɾ. pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ
